nasb.text: “Thus has the Lord of hosts said, ‘Dispense true justice and practice kindness and compassion each to his brother;

esv.text: “Thus says the Lord of hosts, Render true judgments, show kindness and mercy to one another,

cnv.text: “萬軍之耶和華曾這樣告訴你們的列祖說：‘你們要執法公正，各人要以慈愛和憐憫待自己的兄弟。

ccb.text: “万军之耶和华曾对你们的祖先说，‘要秉公行义，彼此以慈爱和怜悯相待。
